insight: The `Discord_Channel` keys in settings.yml (under Rules, Command_Log, Transaction_Log) take a DiscordSRV channel-mapping NAME, not a raw Discord channel ID and not a game chat channel. Users often confuse the example name `global` as meaning game-wide chat; clarify they can use any name they define in DiscordSRV's `config.yml` `Channels:` block (e.g. `protect: "<id>"`) and point a dedicated Discord channel at it.
